headline: Massive Demand for Memory Fund: DRAM ETF Is Now Up 100% in 2026
summary: Shares of the Roundhill Memory ETF (CBOE:DRAM) are extending a parabolic run, trading near $55.80 in Monday midday action and up about 6% on the day. The fund has now roughly doubled since launching on April 2, putting its 2026 gain at approximately 107%. The move caps a blistering stretch for the new fund. Amazingly, ...
